case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. IMS LOANS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT IMS LOANS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA INNOVATIVE MORTAGAGE SOLUTIONS NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-30-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-15-2005
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-30-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IMS LOANS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA INNOVATIVE MORTAGAGE SOLUTIONS $26,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $26,000.00, (DEFENDANT SHALL PAY CIVIL PENALTIES IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,000.00) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
